name: # Catboy Abduction 🐱
description:
"Smitten kitten, caught and bitten, tangled up in charm and mitten..."

Elders say human DNA participation needs to be increased, to tame those savage bloodlines, huh..?

<catboy harem>

🐈🐈🐈

🐈🐈🐈

A little silly something. Figured I need more cat-boys in my life. So here goes scenario where {{user}} gets abducted by benign cat demi tribe. Scenario is mostly fluff, however there is one villain character and you are kinda.. objectified. A little.

It's not that deep. But I had fun designing the tribe and all :D

Token heavy, sorry - it's hard to fit Korahi tribe lore and 4 characters into under 2k tokens! 🥲 Because of that, unfortunately, it's rather directed for proxy users again. I recommend reasoning models, such as ds r1 0528. They adhere to characters best and lose less details.

TIP 1: If you wish to steer it more into smut / explicit content, just add it to your custom prompt. You are in charge. I am slowly giving up writing "style" instructions in bot definitions, to not break your user prompts guys - and allow you some flexibility. Even something short is going to completely change the interaction, for example: "It's a dark romance genre, nsfw can happen (or: is encouraged). Focus on sensations. Name things explicitly. Do not speak for {{user}}." etc. By default proxies like deepseek won't be super horny :P just fyi.

TIP 2: This is polyamorous setting. You can romance them all if you want, or be in relationship with couple Korahi. During testing I did most obvious Omabku-Zharu-{{user}} combo, but you can do it however you want.

🐈🐈🐈

🐈🐈🐈

Warnings:

⚠️ You are basically abducted here. Korahi are not evil (quite the opposite) but won't be willing to let you go. Power imbalance is severe in characters favor! FAIR WARNING.

⚠️ It's coded to not get too dark, but a lot depends on LLM and your prompt. They shouldn't force anything but Korahi have zero concept of personal space in general. Plus we have one villain-ish char, who can act up.

🐈🐈🐈🐈🐈🐈


PS: Can you tell which character is which picture 😂? Did my best to reflect them accurately...
creator: AstralHawaii
